zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Barclay於1445年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可時，她的父親Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie12歲，母親Margaret Innes19歲。她於大約1455年與Malcolm Crawford I在英國蘇格蘭音巴可萊德格林可結婚。她去世於1499年在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Barclay于1445年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾格林可时，她的父亲Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie12岁，母亲Margaret Innes19岁。她于大约1455年与Malcolm Crawford I在英国苏格兰音巴可萊德格林可结婚。她去世于1499年在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barclay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Barkley
meanings: English and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   Barclay  .
Americanized form of German   Berkel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname.

variants.name: Barclift
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Brickley
meanings: English and Irish: metathesized form of   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Barclay was born in 1445, in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie, was 12 and her mother, Margaret Innes, was 19. She married Malcolm Crawford I about 1455, in Greenock, Inverclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom. She died in 1499, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Barclay est née en 1445, à Greenock, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Margaret Innes, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm Crawford I environ 1455, à Greenock, Inverclyde, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1499, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory Barclay 1445 in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie 12 und ihre Mutter Margaret Innes 19. Sie hat um 1455 in Greenock, Inverclyde, Schottland, United Kingdom Malcolm Crawford I geheiratet. Sie starb 1499 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Barclay è nata il nel 1445 nel Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Margaret Innes, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Malcolm Crawford I circa 1455, nel Greenock, Inverclyde, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1499, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Barclayが1445年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノックで生まれた時，父Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnieは12歳，母Margaret Innesは19歳であった。約1455年にイギリススコットランドインバークリドグレエノックでMalcolm Crawford Iと結婚した。彼女は1499年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Barclay(이)가 1445년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Innes(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1455년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버c리드 그린옥크에서 Malcolm Crawford I(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1499년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Barclay nasceu em 1445, em Greenock, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Innes, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm Crawford I aproximadamente 1455, em Greenock, Inverclyde, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1499, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Barclay родилась в 1445 г. в местности гринокк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Innes, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm Crawford I около 1455 г. в местности гринокк, инвирклид, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1499 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory Barclay nació en 1445, en Greenock, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Margaret Innes, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Malcolm Crawford I aproximadamente 1455, en Greenock, Inverclyde, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en 1499, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
